headline: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) Reports Strong Q1 CY2026
summary: Global market infrastructure company Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 48.2% year on year to $3.67 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.35 per share was 3.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
